violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by multiple items. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

Sandwiches and sliced cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
A cat was observed in the premises. Animals must be restricted from entering the premises. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Food Items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024
